title: Debiāpur Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Debiāpur with a Z-Score of +6.43. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Debiāpur has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is significantly higher than usual, with a CDD of 21.5 GG and humidity at 30%. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 2.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
